# CloudSync

CloudSync is our upcoming cloud synchronization service, currently in development.

## Vision
CloudSync will provide seamless file synchronization across cloud providers.
One API to sync files between AWS S3, Google Cloud Storage, Azure Blob, and more.

## Planned Features
- Unified API for multi-cloud file operations
- Intelligent sync with conflict resolution
- Encryption at rest and in transit
- Webhook notifications for sync events

## Development Status
CloudSync is in active development. Expected alpha release: Q3 2025.

## Target Use Cases
- Multi-cloud backup strategies
- Cross-region data replication
- Hybrid cloud file sharing
